case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ ORDONEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ ORDONEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED AUG-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ
